message:
fix: resolve issues #8, #14, and #15

- Strip <command-message>/<command-args> XML tags from slash command
  messages so the user's actual prompt is preserved in transcripts
  instead of raw XML (fixes #8)
- Wire summary_instructions config through buildSummaryPrompt,
  summarizeGroup, and summarizeAll so custom instructions from the
  Settings UI are actually used during summarization (fixes #14)
- Display session UUID in transcript header metadata for easy
  /resume access (fixes #15)
